title.en: HT Control & the HE-variant A-Control subfield catalog (OM/HLA/BSR/UPH/BQR/CAS)
title.zh: HT Control 字段与 HE 变体 A-Control 子字段全集（OM/HLA/BSR/UPH/BQR/CAS）

blocks.en: Some control hints are too small to deserve their own frame. Instead of sending a whole management or control frame just to say "I switched to 40 MHz" or "I still have data queued," 802.11 lets a station piggyback that hint inside a frame it was already going to send. The vehicle is a fixed 4-byte field at the end of the MAC header: the HT Control field. It rides along on QoS Data, QoS Null, and Management frames, present whenever the +HTC bit in the Frame Control field is set.
blocks.zh: 有些控制提示太小，不值得专门发一帧。与其为了说一句“我切到 40 MHz 了”或“我还有数据排队”而单独发一整帧管理帧或控制帧，802.11 允许站点把这条提示“捎带”在它本来就要发的帧里。这个载体就是 MAC 头部末尾固定 4 字节的字段——HT Control 字段。它会搭在 QoS Data、QoS Null 和管理帧上，只要 Frame Control 字段里的 +HTC 位被置 1，它就出现。

blocks.en: The same 4 bytes have been reused across Wi-Fi generations, so the first job is figuring out which dialect you are reading. For a non-CMMG station, the leading bits B0 and B1 act as a tiny selector: B0=0 means the HT variant; B0=1, B1=0 means the VHT variant; B0=1, B1=1 means the HE variant. A CMMG station uses a single dedicated form, the CMMG variant. Two bits decide which map to read the remaining 28-30 bits against.
blocks.zh: 这同一组 4 字节在 Wi-Fi 各代之间被反复复用，所以第一件事是搞清楚你在读哪种“方言”。对于非 CMMG 站点，开头的 B0、B1 两位充当一个小小的选择器：B0=0 表示 HT 变体；B0=1、B1=0 表示 VHT 变体；B0=1、B1=1 表示 HE 变体。CMMG 站点则使用一种专用的单一形式——CMMG 变体。两位即可决定该用哪张“地图”去解读其余的 28~30 位。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
    A["HT Control field (4 bytes, +HTC=1)"] --> B{"non-CMMG STA?"}
    B -->|yes| C{"B0 / B1 selector"}
    B -->|no| G["CMMG variant"]
    C -->|B0=0| D["HT variant: HT Control Middle"]
    C -->|B0=1,B1=0| E["VHT variant: VHT Control Middle"]
    C -->|B0=1,B1=1| F["HE variant: A-Control"]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
    A["HT Control 字段 (4 字节, +HTC=1)"] --> B{"是非 CMMG 站点?"}
    B -->|是| C{"B0 / B1 选择器"}
    B -->|否| G["CMMG 变体"]
    C -->|B0=0| D["HT 变体: HT Control Middle"]
    C -->|B0=1,B1=0| E["VHT 变体: VHT Control Middle"]
    C -->|B0=1,B1=1| F["HE 变体: A-Control"]

blocks.en: The HT and VHT variants mostly carry link-adaptation feedback (MCS requests and recommendations, sounding/calibration control, beamforming feedback type). The HE variant is where things get modular — instead of one fixed layout, it carries a list of small Control subfields, each self-describing. That list is what the rest of this lesson tours.
blocks.zh: HT 与 VHT 变体主要携带链路自适应反馈（MCS 请求与推荐、探测/校准控制、波束成形反馈类型）。而 HE 变体则变得“模块化”——它不再是一个固定布局，而是携带一串小型的 Control 子字段，每个都自带说明。本课接下来要游览的，正是这串列表。

blocks.en: Inside the HE variant, the A-Control subfield is a Control List followed by optional padding (zeros) that pads the whole thing to 30 bits. The Control List is one or more Control subfields, and each Control subfield is two parts: a 4-bit Control ID that names what this entry is, and a Control Information field whose length is fixed per ID. So a single HT Control field can stack several independent hints back to back — one OM update next to one buffer-status report, for example — as long as they fit in the budget.
blocks.zh: 在 HE 变体内部，A-Control 子字段由一个 Control List 加上可选的填充（全 0）组成，填充把整体补齐到 30 位。Control List 包含一个或多个 Control 子字段，而每个 Control 子字段分两部分：一个 4 位的 Control ID，用来标明这一条是什么；以及一个长度随 ID 固定的 Control Information 字段。因此，单个 HT Control 字段可以把若干条互不相干的提示首尾相接地叠放在一起——例如把一条 OM 更新和一条缓冲状态报告并排放——只要总长度放得下。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 520 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><text x='10' y='20' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='13'>A-Control = Control List + Padding (total 30 bits)</text><rect x='10' y='35' width='120' height='40'/><rect x='130' y='35' width='120' height='40'/><rect x='250' y='35' width='120' height='40'/><rect x='370' y='35' width='90' height='40' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='70' y='60' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>Control #1</text><text x='190' y='60' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>Control #2</text><text x='310' y='60' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>Control #3</text><text x='415' y='60' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle'>Padding (0s)</text><rect x='10' y='100' width='55' height='34'/><rect x='65' y='100' width='185' height='34'/><text x='37' y='121' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Control ID</text><text x='157' y='121' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>Control Information (length per ID)</text><text x='37' y='148' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>4 bits</text></svg>

caption.en: One Control subfield = a 4-bit Control ID plus a fixed-length Control Information field; several stack into the Control List, then padding fills to 30 bits.
caption.zh: 一个 Control 子字段 = 4 位 Control ID 加上一个定长的 Control Information 字段；若干个叠成 Control List，再以填充补齐到 30 位。

blocks.en: Now the catalog — each Control ID with its one job. ID 0, TRS (Triggered Response Scheduling), tells a station how to send an immediate response without waiting for a Trigger frame. ID 1, OM (Operating Mode), announces a change in operating parameters — receive bandwidth, number of spatial streams (Nss), and UL-MU willingness. ID 2, HLA (HE Link Adaptation), carries link-adaptation feedback for HE rates. ID 3, BSR (Buffer Status Report), reports how much traffic the station has queued — the unsolicited cousin of what a BSRP Trigger frame asks for. ID 4, UPH (UL Power Headroom), reports how much transmit-power headroom the station has left for uplink. ID 5, BQR (Bandwidth Query Report), reports which 20 MHz subchannels the station found idle — the answer a BQRP Trigger frame solicits. ID 6, CAS (Command and Status), carries a compact command/status exchange. IDs 7-14 are reserved.
blocks.zh: 现在来看这份目录——每个 Control ID 各司一职。ID 0，TRS（触发式响应调度）：告诉站点如何在不等待 Trigger 帧的情况下发送即时响应。ID 1，OM（工作模式）：宣告工作参数的变化——接收带宽、空间流数（Nss）以及上行 MU 的意愿。ID 2，HLA（HE 链路自适应）：携带针对 HE 速率的链路自适应反馈。ID 3，BSR（缓冲状态报告）：报告站点排队了多少待发流量——它是 BSRP Trigger 帧所询问内容的“非请自来”版本。ID 4，UPH（上行功率余量）：报告站点上行还剩多少发射功率余量。ID 5，BQR（带宽查询报告）：报告站点探测到哪些 20 MHz 子信道空闲——正是 BQRP Trigger 帧所征询的答复。ID 6，CAS（命令与状态）：承载一次紧凑的命令/状态交互。ID 7~14 为保留。

blocks.en: Two of these are the unsolicited halves of a Trigger-frame conversation. A BSR (ID 3) is what a station would send back to a BSRP (Buffer Status Report Poll) Trigger; a BQR (ID 5) answers a BQRP (Bandwidth Query Report Poll) Trigger. Riding them in HT Control lets a station volunteer the same information without being polled — the AP gets a scheduling hint for free on a frame already in flight.
blocks.zh: 其中两条正是 Trigger 帧对话里“不请自来”的那一半。BSR（ID 3）就是站点对 BSRP（缓冲状态报告轮询）Trigger 所要回送的内容；BQR（ID 5）则回应 BQRP（带宽查询报告轮询）Trigger。把它们捎带在 HT Control 里，站点无需被轮询就能主动上报同样的信息——AP 在一帧本就在途的帧上，白白获得了一条调度提示。

summary.en: Where the standard pins down the selector and the Control ID table
summary.zh: 标准在何处钉死了选择器与 Control ID 表

blocks.en: 9.2.4.6.1 (General) defines the HT Control field as present in a Control Wrapper frame and in QoS Data, QoS Null, and Management frames per the +HTC subfield; Table 9-15 fixes the variant selector — B0=0 = HT, B0=1/B1=0 = VHT, B0=1/B1=1 = HE — for non-CMMG STAs. 9.2.4.6.2 (HT variant) lays out the HT Control Middle with its Link Adaptation Control (TRQ/MAI/MFSI/MFB-ASELC) and calibration/CSI/NDP subfields; 9.2.4.6.3 (VHT variant) defines the VHT Control Middle (MRQ, MSI/STBC, MFSI/GID-L, MFB, GID-H, Coding Type, FB Tx Type, Unsolicited MFB). 9.2.4.6.4 (HE variant) defines the A-Control as a Control List of Control subfields plus padding to 30 bits, with each Control subfield being a 4-bit Control ID and a fixed-length Control Information field; Table 9-25 enumerates the IDs: 0 TRS (26 bits), 1 OM (12), 2 HLA (26), 3 BSR (26), 4 UPH (8), 5 BQR (10), 6 CAS (8), 7-14 reserved. 9.2.4.6.5 defines the single CMMG variant form used by a CMMG STA.
blocks.zh: 9.2.4.6.1（总则）规定 HT Control 字段出现在 Control Wrapper 帧以及按 +HTC 子字段决定的 QoS Data、QoS Null 和管理帧中；表 9-15 钉死了变体选择器——对非 CMMG 站点，B0=0 为 HT、B0=1/B1=0 为 VHT、B0=1/B1=1 为 HE。9.2.4.6.2（HT 变体）给出 HT Control Middle，含其链路自适应控制（TRQ/MAI/MFSI/MFB-ASELC）以及校准/CSI/NDP 等子字段；9.2.4.6.3（VHT 变体）定义 VHT Control Middle（MRQ、MSI/STBC、MFSI/GID-L、MFB、GID-H、Coding Type、FB Tx Type、Unsolicited MFB）。9.2.4.6.4（HE 变体）将 A-Control 定义为由若干 Control 子字段构成的 Control List 加填充至 30 位，每个 Control 子字段由 4 位 Control ID 与定长的 Control Information 字段组成；表 9-25 列举各 ID：0 TRS（26 位）、1 OM（12）、2 HLA（26）、3 BSR（26）、4 UPH（8）、5 BQR（10）、6 CAS（8）、7~14 保留。9.2.4.6.5 定义 CMMG 站点所用的单一 CMMG 变体形式。

cites.note: 9.2.4.6.1 General + Table 9-15 — HT Control field presence and the B0/B1 variant selector (HT/VHT/HE), CMMG noted
9.2.4.6.2 HT variant — HT Control Middle, Link Adaptation Control (TRQ/MAI/MFSI/MFB-ASELC), calibration/CSI/NDP
9.2.4.6.3 VHT variant — VHT Control Middle subfields (MRQ, MSI/STBC, MFB, etc.)
9.2.4.6.4 HE variant A-Control + Table 9-25 Control ID catalog (TRS/OM/HLA/BSR/UPH/BQR/CAS); 9.2.4.6.5 CMMG variant
